# boxer_policy_set (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the policy set.
- `schema` (String) The schema that the policy set conforms to.

### Read-Only

- `data_cedar` (String) The Cedar schema data in Cedar format.
- `data_json` (String) The Cedar schema data in Cedar format.
